

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
#=================================
#1. Load libraries and input data
#=================================
# This section loads required packages, helper functions, colour mappings,
# and the integrated spatial object with accompanying annotation data.
# Output: no figure; workspace and input objects for downstream DRAXIN analyses.

library(patchwork)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(batchelor)
library(scran)
library(scater)
library(ggspavis)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(pheatmap)
library(UCell)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 14))
source("../scripts/general_functions.R")

minmaxscale <- function(x, ...) {
  (x - min(x, ...)) / (max(x, ...) - min(x, ...))
}

get_gene_vec <- function(se, gene, assay_priority = c("logcounts", "counts")) {
  rn <- rownames(se)
  hit <- which(rn == gene)
  if (length(hit) == 0) hit <- which(toupper(rn) == toupper(gene))
  if (length(hit) == 0) stop("Gene not found in rownames(se): ", gene)

  for (assay_name in assay_priority) {
    if (assay_name %in% assayNames(se)) {
      return(as.numeric(assay(se, assay_name)[hit[1], ]))
    }
  }
  stop("None of the requested assays found: ", paste(assay_priority, collapse = ", "))
}

score_signature_mat <- function(genes, mat) {
  idx <- match(toupper(unique(genes)), toupper(rownames(mat)))
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(rep(NA_real_, ncol(mat)))
  colMeans(mat[idx, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
}

c25 <- c(
  "dodgerblue2", "#E31A1C", "green4", "#6A3D9A", "#FF7F00",
  "black", "gold1", "skyblue2", "#FB9A99", "palegreen2",
  "#CAB2D6", "#FDBF6F", "gray70", "khaki2", "maroon",
  "orchid1", "deeppink1", "blue1", "steelblue4", "darkturquoise",
  "green1", "yellow4", "yellow3", "darkorange4", "brown"
)

color_maping <- c(
  "Acinar" = "gold1",
  "B_cells" = "maroon",
  "Lymphocyte(CD4)" = "green4",
  "Lymphocytes" = "green4",
  "Myeloid(Macrophages)" = "#6A3D9A",
  "Endothelial" = "#FF7F00",
  "Endocrine" = "yellow4",
  "Stellate" = "khaki2",
  "CAF" = "skyblue2",
  "Adipocytes" = "steelblue4",
  "Lymphocyte(NK)" = "green2",
  "Lymphocyte(CD8)" = "palegreen2",
  "Myeloid" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Schwann" = "#FDBF6F",
  "Myeloid(C1q_macrophages)" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Nerve" = "#FDBF6F",
  "Muscle" = "orchid1",
  "Ductal_malignant" = "gray70",
  "Ductal_normal" = "black",
  "B_cells_(Plasma cells)" = "brown1"
)

spe <- readRDS("../data/SPE/Integrated_NMF.rds")
colData(spe) <- DataFrame(read.csv("../data/coldata/DE_SPE_annotaion.csv"))
colnames(spe) <- spe$barcode

bg <- data.frame(colData(spe)[, c("array_col", "array_row", "tumor", "sample_id")])
W_df <- readRDS("../data/Deconvolution/RCTD_weights.Rds")

# Extract NMF component matrix for selected spatial signal visualisations
comp <- as.matrix(t(reducedDims(spe)[["compk30"]]))
spe$adipocytes <- comp["Adipocytes", ]

```

```{r}
#=================================
#3. Define nerve-only objects and metadata
#=================================
# This section subsets the spatial object to nerve spots and builds a unified
# metadata table used in downstream DRAXIN quantification and category-based analyses.
# Output: no figure; nerve-only objects and metadata tables.

spe_nerve <- spe[, colData(spe)$is.nerve == TRUE]

nerve_meta_df <- data.frame(
  barcode    = as.character(spe_nerve$barcode),
  patient_id = as.factor(colData(spe_nerve)$patient_id),
  NerveID    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$NerveID),
  Invaded    = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$Invaded),
  type_raw   = as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$type),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

nerve_meta_df$types_grouped <- ifelse(nerve_meta_df$type_raw == "noPNI", "Adjacent", "Diseased")
nerve_meta_df$nerve_category <- ifelse(
  nerve_meta_df$Invaded == "NonInvaded",
  paste0("NonInvaded_", nerve_meta_df$types_grouped),
  nerve_meta_df$Invaded
)

nerve_meta_df <- nerve_meta_df[!is.na(nerve_meta_df$nerve_category), ]
nerve_meta_df$nerve_category <- factor(
  nerve_meta_df$nerve_category,
  levels = c("NonInvaded_Adjacent", "NonInvaded_Diseased", "Invaded")
)

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggnewscale)
library(cowplot)

genes_to_plot <- c("BTC", "FGF5", "IL11")

sample_order <- c(
  "6249bl23_noPNI",
  "6249bl18_noPNIandhighPNI"
)

label_map <- c(
  "6249bl23_noPNI"   = "P1-Adjacent",
  "6249bl18_noPNIandhighPNI" = "P1-Diseased"
)

# Subset to P1 adjacent + diseased
spe_sub <- spe[, as.character(colData(spe)$sample_id) %in% sample_order]
spe_nerve_sub <- spe_nerve[, as.character(colData(spe_nerve)$sample_id) %in% sample_order]

colData(spe_sub)$sample_id <- factor(
  as.character(colData(spe_sub)$sample_id),
  levels = sample_order
)

colData(spe_nerve_sub)$sample_id <- factor(
  as.character(colData(spe_nerve_sub)$sample_id),
  levels = sample_order
)

#---------------------------------
# Build nerve hulls ONCE
#---------------------------------
make_nerve_hulls <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    group_by(sample_id, NerveID, Invaded) %>%
    filter(n() >= 3) %>%
    slice(chull(x, y)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(group_id = interaction(sample_id, NerveID, drop = TRUE))
}

hulls_df <- as.data.frame(colData(spe_nerve_sub)) %>%
  transmute(
    x = as.numeric(array_col),
    y = -as.numeric(array_row),
    sample_id = factor(as.character(sample_id), levels = sample_order),
    NerveID = as.character(NerveID),
    Invaded = as.character(Invaded)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y), !is.na(sample_id), !is.na(NerveID), !is.na(Invaded)) %>%
  make_nerve_hulls()

hulls_inv <- hulls_df %>% filter(Invaded == "Invaded")
hulls_non <- hulls_df %>% filter(Invaded == "NonInvaded")

#---------------------------------
# Expression helper
#---------------------------------
get_plot_expr <- function(se, gene, use_assay = c("logcounts", "counts")) {
  use_assay <- match.arg(use_assay)

  vals <- get_gene_vec(se, gene, assay_priority = c(use_assay))

  if (use_assay == "counts") {
    vals <- log2(vals + 1)
  }

  as.numeric(vals)
}

#---------------------------------
# Plot function
# each gene gets its own max
#---------------------------------
plot_gene_spatial <- function(se_obj, gene, hulls_inv, hulls_non,
                              sample_order, label_map,
                              use_assay = "logcounts") {

  expr_vec <- get_plot_expr(se_obj, gene, use_assay = use_assay)

  plot_df <- as.data.frame(colData(se_obj)) %>%
    transmute(
      x = as.numeric(array_col),
      y = -as.numeric(array_row),
      sample_id = factor(as.character(sample_id), levels = sample_order),
      expr = expr_vec
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y), !is.na(sample_id), is.finite(expr))

  # gene-specific max from only this gene
  expr_max <- max(plot_df$expr, na.rm = TRUE)

  message(gene, " max expression = ", round(expr_max, 3))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = expr), size = 0.1, pch = 19) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(
      option = "A",
      limits = c(0, expr_max),
      oob = scales::squish,
      name = paste0(gene, "\nlog2 expr"),
      guide = guide_colorbar(order = 1)
    ) +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_non,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.2,
      color = "white",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_inv,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.2,
      color = "white",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_non,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, color = "Non-invaded"),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.2,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hulls_inv,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, color = "Invaded"),
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.2,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Nerve outline",
      values = c(
        "Non-invaded" = "skyblue2",
        "Invaded" = "khaki2"
      ),
      breaks = c("Invaded", "Non-invaded")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~sample_id, labeller = as_labeller(label_map)) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_void() +
    labs(title = gene) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
}

#---------------------------------
# Make the 3 gene plots
#---------------------------------
plot_list <- lapply(
  genes_to_plot,
  function(g) plot_gene_spatial(
    se_obj = spe_sub,
    gene = g,
    hulls_inv = hulls_inv,
    hulls_non = hulls_non,
    sample_order = sample_order,
    label_map = label_map,
    use_assay = "logcounts"
  )
)

#---------------------------------
# Build ONE separate hull legend
#---------------------------------
legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = c(1, 1),
  y = c(1, 2),
  group = c("Non-invaded", "Invaded")
)

hull_legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = group)) +
  geom_path(aes(group = group), linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Nerve outline",
    values = c(
      "Non-invaded" = "skyblue2",
      "Invaded" = "khaki2"
    ),
    breaks = c("Invaded", "Non-invaded")
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )

hull_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(hull_legend_plot)

#---------------------------------
# Combine plots + separate hull legend column
#---------------------------------
plots_combined <- wrap_plots(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 1)

p_p1_three_genes <- plots_combined | patchwork::wrap_elements(hull_legend)

p_p1_three_genes <- p_p1_three_genes +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.16)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Patient 1 spatial expression with NI and Invaded nerve hulls")

p_p1_three_genes
```


```{r}

ggsave("../figures/p_p1_three_genes.pdf", p_p1_three_genes, width = 8.5, height = 12)
ggsave("../figures/p_p1_three_genes.png", p_p1_three_genes, width = 8.5, height = 12, dpi = 600)
```
